# D&R Flooring

> D&R Flooring is a flooring retailer and installation company serving Langley, BC and the surrounding Fraser Valley. We supply and install hardwood, engineered hardwood, laminate, luxury vinyl (SPC/WPC/vinyl plank), ceramic tile, underlay, and flooring accessories, and offer expert local advice and installation services.

Use these links to find D&R Flooring's product categories, services, locations, and buying guides. All content is first-party and may be cited.

## Shop by category

- [Laminate Flooring](https://drflooring.ca/collections/laminate-flooring): Durable, budget-friendly laminate floors.
- [Engineered Flooring](https://drflooring.ca/collections/engineered-flooring): Real-wood-veneer engineered hardwood, stable over subfloors and moisture.
- [Vinyl Flooring](https://drflooring.ca/collections/vinyl-flooring): Waterproof luxury vinyl flooring.
- [SPC Flooring](https://drflooring.ca/collections/spc): Rigid-core stone-plastic-composite (SPC) waterproof planks and tiles.
- [WPC Flooring](https://drflooring.ca/collections/wpc): Wood-plastic-composite waterproof flooring with a softer, warmer feel.
- [Ceramic Tile](https://drflooring.ca/collections/ceramic-tile): Ceramic tile for floors and walls.
- [Underlay](https://drflooring.ca/collections/underlay): Underlayment for laminate, vinyl, and engineered floors.
- [Flooring Accessories](https://drflooring.ca/collections/flooring-accessories): Reducers, stair nose, trims, and finishing pieces.
- [Clearance](https://drflooring.ca/collections/clearance): Discounted flooring deals.
- [Shop all flooring](https://drflooring.ca/collections/all): Full product catalogue.

## Services & locations

- [Our Services](https://drflooring.ca/pages/services): Flooring supply and professional installation.
- [Flooring in Langley](https://drflooring.ca/pages/flooring-in-langley): Local flooring supply and installation in Langley, BC.
- [Laminate Flooring in Langley](https://drflooring.ca/pages/laminate-flooring-in-langley): Laminate options and installation for Langley homes.
- [Vinyl Flooring in Langley](https://drflooring.ca/pages/vinyl-flooring-in-langley): Waterproof vinyl flooring for Langley homes.
- [About Us](https://drflooring.ca/pages/about-us): About D&R Flooring.
- [Store Locator](https://drflooring.ca/pages/store-locator): Find our showroom.
- [Contact Us](https://drflooring.ca/pages/contact): Get a quote or ask a question.

## Guides & blog

- [Flooring Blog](https://drflooring.ca/blogs/news): Buying guides, material comparisons (hardwood vs laminate, vinyl vs tile), installation and maintenance how-tos, and cost guidance.
- [Sitemap](https://drflooring.ca/sitemap.xml): Full machine-readable index of all pages, products, and posts.
